reasoning: The informal statement claims GL_2(Z_2) ≅ S_3 as groups. In the Lean statement, `Matrix.GeneralLinearGroup (Fin 2) (ZMod 2)` unfolds to `(Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 2))ˣ`, which is exactly the group of invertible 2×2 matrices over the field ZMod 2; since ZMod 2 is a field, invertibility coincides with "det ≠ 0". `Equiv.Perm (Fin 3)` is the symmetric group S_3 on 3 elements, and `≃*` is a multiplicative group isomorphism. Wrapping in `Nonempty` correctly expresses "there exists an isomorphism" as a Prop. This is a standard faithful encoding of the informal claim.
